snippet.title: Master Ji Ka Bhoot - Amit Bhadana
snippet.description:
Do badmash students ne kar rakha hai apne master ji ki naak mein dum aur is duniya mein nahi hai unka koi bhi ilaaj. Par kya karenge vo dono jab master ji dosari duniya se mangne ayenge jawaab? Is kahani mein hum aapko parlok ki sair karayenge, thoda sa darr lagega par bahut sara hansayenge. Masterji ki class mein attendance lagao aur bakiyon ko bhi le kar aao.

Follow Me On Instagram & Twitter ⬇️

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/theamitbhadana

Twitter: https://twitter.com/iAmitBhadana 

🎬 Video Team 

Directed By : Amit Bhadana, Swapnil Narendra 
Written & Created By : Amit Bhadana

snippet.title: Surya Web Series || Episode - 3 || Shanmukh Jaswanth || Mounika Reddy || Infinitum Media
snippet.description:
Entri is the perfect solution - handy and hassle-free in function, providing all job-seekers with a personalized learning experience at your fingertip. You can prepare for any government job exam of your choice like APPSC, TSPSC, RRB, TET, SSC, Banking etc. with Entri App. Click the below link to download Entri App : https://bit.ly/EntriShanmukh


Shannu plays the boy next door in the new series, SURYA. Watch Surya's life unfold with highs, lows and everything in between. This one is for every guy who faces life and its challenges as they come. 

Cast:- Shanmukh Jaswanth, Mounika Reddy, Chandu JC, Murali Krishna, Padma Venkat, Likitha Tejomurthula, Ravi Shiva Teja, Shiva Prasad, Avinash Varma, Revathinadha, Dhana Balla, Hanumantha Rao, Satya Prerepa, Rajeshwari

Written & Directed by - Subbu.K

Editor -  Krishna Karthik Vunnava

Cinematography & DI - Vamshi Srinivas 

Sound engineer - Vamsi Vinod Nalli (Nani)

Music - Suman Vankara

Title Animation - Nikhil Concepts

Poster Designer - Nikhil Concepts

Line Producer - Sajeev

#ShanmukhJaswanth​ Famously known as " Shannu" is a Telugu comedy & Entertainment Youtube Content Creator.

 We upload the latest Telugu comedy videos.

This is Produced by #Infinitum media.

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/InfinitumOriginals

snippet.title: Teri Aadat | Siddharth Nigam | Anushka Sen | Abhi Dutt | New Hindi Song| Official Video| BLive Music
snippet.description:
Sanjay Kukreja and BLive Music presents new official video song Teri Aadat soulful vocal by ABHI DUTT featuring Siddharth Nigam and Anushka Sen. The lyrics are penned by Ishaan Khan and the music directed by Aishwarya Tripathi. Nitin Fcp & Nadeem Akhtar have directed the video. This latest song is created by Mahesh Kukreja.

#TeriAadat  #AbhiDutt  #LatestSongs2021 #SiddharthNigam #AnushkaSen #BLiveMusic

hi.title: Dice Media | Operation MBBS | Season 2 | Web Series | Episode 1 - Honeymoon Period
hi.description:
The second year of MBBS is known to medical students as the honeymoon period before things begin to get really tough 📚
But as our trio settle into this new phase, they realise they’ll have to dig deeper than they expected, especially with one particular case of coronavirus taking a personal toll on all their lives later on! 🦠

Unacademy presents Operation MBBS 2.
#DiceOperationMBBS2 #AyushMehra #AnshulChauhan #SarahHashmi

With Unacademy, you too can get guidance from India’s Top Educators, build a strong foundation and crack NEET-UG with ease. 
Download the Unacademy Learning App here: https://unacademy.onelink.me/M2BR/67950194
With comprehensive and curated Batch Courses for more than 40 Exam Categories, Unacademy is India’s largest learning platform. Use code MBBS10 to get 10% off on your NEET UG subscription. #LetsCrackIt

snippet.title: Babuni Tere Rang Mein | Pawan Singh, Tridha, Sharvi | Dr Sagar | Salim Sulaiman | Merchant Records
snippet.description:
Tayyar ho jaiye iss Holi ka jashn manane ke liye, aapke apne #PawanSingh ke sath! We had so much fun making this video with Pawan Singh and Tridha Chaudhury with beautiful vocals by Pawan Singh and Sharvi Yadav! 

Apna pyaar dijiye and let's celebrate #Holi2021 in the power-star-Pawan style! ✨ Subscribe now for more music every week!

🎧 Listen to & download 'Babuni Tere Rang Mein' on:

Wynk: https://wynk.in/music/song/babuni-tere-rang-mein/or_196006272005_ING642100271

JioSaavn: https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/babuni-tere-rang-mein/Rx8cfExHY34

Gaana: https://gaana.com/song/babuni-tere-rang-mein

Resso: https://m.resso.app/ZSJN3Jk64/

Hungama: https://www.hungama.com/song/babuni-tere-rang-mein/63302712/

Amazon Prime Music: https://music.amazon.in/albums/B08YDCVW7H?trackAsin=B08YDDZ4P7&ref=dm_sh_IQcfo2LLvB4GEnQac1ImmRrLZ

Vodafone Customers Dial 53712379375
Idea Customers Dial 53712379375
BSNL Customers Dial 5678912379375

Audio Credits -

Music Composed & Produced by : Salim - Sulaiman

Lyrics -

Rango ki katori hun
Tang se chatori hun
Chahun mai colorful piya

Chahat ki tarango mein
Doobi hun mai rango mein
Pink pink mora jiya

Geeli geeli si
Geeli geeli meri dhaar
Aaja dekh le fuhaar
Pichkaari nahi ye
Tere love ka shikaar

Babuni tere rang mein
Babuni tere rang mein
Mai aur thoda young ho gyaa
Mai bhola bhaala lalla
Chappan inch dabangg ho gaya
Babuni tere rang me
Mai aur thoda young ho gaya

Antra

Kulhad mein whisky
Toh saiyaan ji hai risky
Kulhad mein whisky
Toh saiyaan ji hai risky
Maare ignore
Mai deewani hui jiski

Peeli peeli hai.. Haaye
Peeli peeli maine chaar
Ki hairaan thekedaar
Mujhko majnu banaake
De de laila waala pyaar

Babuni tere rang me
Mai aur thoda young ho gaya
Kheenchein jaise chumbak emotion tera
Babuni tere rang me
Chappan inch dabangg ho gaya
Naam saare jille me roshan tera

Babuni tere rang mein,
Mai aur thoda.. ho gaya!

Babuni tere rang me

snippet.title: GAURAV KI FASS GAYI | Gaurav Kapoor | Stand-Up Comedy | Crowd Work
snippet.description:
Hello Everyone. This video is from a show that I did in Chandigarh. This is a mix of jokes and very little crowd work in between. The whole situation though was not pre planned and happened because of a little issue with the denim I was wearing. It's basically a comedy of errors more than a prepared stand up bit.
If you liked the video. Do follow on instagram for regular live show updates:
My Insta: https://www.instagram.com/gauravkpoor/
Also, New Vlog channel is also there where I post regular videos but not of Stand Up. They are just regular fun videos:

𝐃𝐢𝐬𝐜𝐥𝐚𝐢𝐦𝐞𝐫📢📢📢

snippet.description:

Hope you liked this video and my collection.

snippet.title: Types Of Unboxers | Jordindian
snippet.description:
“WHAT’S IN THE BOX??”, shouted Brad Pitt. Little did we know that we would feel the same way while watching, what is known very famously today as, ‘Unboxing Videos’. Some might even call it therapeutic. But that’s far from what you’re going to see in this video. Watch as we put a Jordindian twist on the different types of unboxing experiences.

snippet.title: KHASA AALA CHAHAR : LOOT LIYA (Official Video) | Sweta Chauhan | New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021
snippet.description:
KHASA AALA CHAHAR : LOOT LIYA (Official Video) | Sweta Chauhan | New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021

Nav Haryanvi Presenting "Loot Liya (Official Video)" a New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021. Sung by Khasa Aala Chahar. Starring with Khasa Aala Chahar and Sweta Chauhan. Music Given by Ghanu Music. Penned by Khasa Aala Chahar. This Video Directed by Ameet Choudhary. Music Label by Nupur Audio.

#KhasaAalaChahar #LootLiya #SwetaChauhan #NewHaryanviSongsHaryanavi2021

Song : Loot Liya (Official Video)
Singer/Lyricist/Composer : Khasa Aala Chahar
Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/khasa_aala_chahar/
Music : Ghanu Music
Mix Master : D Chandu

LOVE !! LIKE !! COMMENTS !! SUBSCRIBE

Khasa Aala Chahar - Loot Liya Listen & Download From :
Gaana - http://bit.ly/30JTZgM

Resso Music - https://bit.ly/3cAsbAO
Amazon Music - http://amzn.to/3lf1hCy
BoomPlay - http://bit.ly/3bMNUq1

Lyrics -
Jab dekhya pehli baar tere te pyar tere te ho gaya re,
Yo toot na jave sapna sa yo soch ferrer te te so gaya re,
Main khud sapne mein kho gaya re mane bera na ke ho gaya re,
Location teri bhardi oye aur tere pyar ka root liya,

Oye Loot liya re loot liya oye din dhole tane loot liya,
Oye tu chambal ki daaku se tane din dhole main loot liya, Loot liya loot liya,

O kit re tu aayi hai aur kit si tane jaana se,
Debate chalegi tere pe ib shuru kiya se gaana se,
Abhiyaan search tera jaari hai tane galti kardi bhaari se,
Ib chaapa padna tere pe kara Janhit bheta jari se,
Oye haani karak zehar tera aur galti te maine ghoot liya,

Oye Loot liya re loot liya oye din dhole tane loot liya,
Oye tu chambal ki daaku se tane din dhole main loot liya, Loot liya loot liya,

Tu paue jitni dikikhan mein or bottle barga asar tera,
Re samajh kise ke aaya na isa kar diya se yo hashar mera,
Nu aage pache bohot ghani par dil tere pe aaya se,
Akhand taareef ki patar tu jab geet tere pe gaya hai,
Baaki to sab moh-maya se aur sabka bhanda foot liya,

Oye Loot liya re loot liya oye din dhole tane loot liya,
Oye tu chambal ki daaku se tane din dhole main loot liya, Loot liya loot liya, 

Oye yaar tera full paapi hai na duji koi copy se,
Mai ek ekla antique su ya news aa ne bhi chaapi hai,
Re Dil te Dhanyawad karu meri zindagi mein jo aayi tu,
Ya saare raaji ho jange banja inki bharjayi tu,
Chal chhod jeans or top tera ja Mere naam ka suit liya,

Oye Loot liya re loot liya oye din dhole tane loot liya,
Oye tu chambal ki daaku se tane din dhole main loot liya, Loot liya loot liya.

snippet.title: நாடு முழுவதும் மீண்டும் ஊரடங்கு? - பிரதமர் ஆலோசனை | PM Modi Discussion | Coronavirus | Lockdown
snippet.description:
நாடு முழுவதும் மீண்டும் வேகமாக பரவும் கொரோனா தொற்று

மாநில முதல்வர்களுடன் பிரதமர் மோடி இன்று ஆலோசனை

காணொலியில் நடைபெறும் முக்கிய ஆலோசனை கூட்டம்

கொரோனா பாதிப்பு நிலவரம் குறித்து முதலமைச்சர்களிடம் கருத்து கேட்பு

கொரோனா பரவலை குறைப்பதற்கான ஆலோசனைகளை பிரதமர் வழங்க உள்ளார்

தடுப்பூசி போடும் பணிகளை முடுக்கிவிடுவது குறித்தும் ஆலோசிக்கப்பட உள்ளது

மகாராஷ்டிரா, பஞ்சாப், கர்நாடகா, குஜராத், தமிழ்நாடு ஆகிய மாநிலங்களில் தொற்று அதிகரிப்பு

கொரோனா நிலவரம் - பிரதமர் இன்று ஆலோசனை

#Coronavirus #Lockdown #PMModi

Uploaded on 17/03/2021:

localized.title: நாடு முழுவதும் மீண்டும் ஊரடங்கு? - பிரதமர் ஆலோசனை | PM Modi Discussion | Coronavirus | Lockdown
localized.description:
நாடு முழுவதும் மீண்டும் வேகமாக பரவும் கொரோனா தொற்று

மாநில முதல்வர்களுடன் பிரதமர் மோடி இன்று ஆலோசனை

காணொலியில் நடைபெறும் முக்கிய ஆலோசனை கூட்டம்

கொரோனா பாதிப்பு நிலவரம் குறித்து முதலமைச்சர்களிடம் கருத்து கேட்பு

கொரோனா பரவலை குறைப்பதற்கான ஆலோசனைகளை பிரதமர் வழங்க உள்ளார்

தடுப்பூசி போடும் பணிகளை முடுக்கிவிடுவது குறித்தும் ஆலோசிக்கப்பட உள்ளது

மகாராஷ்டிரா, பஞ்சாப், கர்நாடகா, குஜராத், தமிழ்நாடு ஆகிய மாநிலங்களில் தொற்று அதிகரிப்பு

கொரோனா நிலவரம் - பிரதமர் இன்று ஆலோசனை

snippet.title: The ROG Phone 5 has a Problem - Durability Test Fail!
snippet.description:
The ROG Phone 5 is the most powerful gaming phone on the market... but is it durable? Today we find out. Grab your pocket sized Anker Charger here: US: https://ankerfast.club/30T6Tce UK: https://ankerfast.club/3bVfIbW DE: https://ankerfast.club/30RPy3x The ROG phone 5 is a pretty expensive and powerful gaming smartphone. Its lost the iconic aerodynamic hump from the previous 3 versions of the phone, and now the ROG 5 has added dual batteries so it can charge faster. But will that compromise the Structural integrity of the ROG 5? I mean... yeah. You've seen the thumbnail. The ROG Phone five definitely has some structural issues.... 

Get my razor knife here! https://www.jerryrigknife.com/

snippet.description:
Kuvera is India’s First Free Direct Mutual Fund and Wealth management Platform.

Sagar and Jogi are one of the most notorious students of college and our hero has just found out his ‘girl crush Reeya. As we say that first impression is the last impression, yahan Ek taraf hai South Delhi ki sophisticated pari aur doosri taraf West Delhi ka boy! 
Kya Sagar aur Reeya ki ye pehli mulaqaat kuch rang dikhayegi ya inke beech me differences is journey ka kardenge ‘The End’?
We are here with the first episode of ‘Poles Apart.’ Let’s see if your affection for Sagar and Reeya makes them fall in love with each other. 
What’s packed in the series is all yours to find out, Watch Now!

snippet.title: Major Glimpse | Major Teaser on 28th March | Adivi Sesh | Sobhita | Saiee Manjrekar | Mahesh Babu
snippet.description:
Major Glimpse: On Major Sandeep Unnikrishnan's Birth Anniversary, we remember.

‘The film speaks about the way he lived, not about the way he lost his life.’ Today, March 15th, Major Sandeep Unnikrishnan's birth anniversary, is not just a day to remember him but also a day to celebrate his glorious life.

#MajorTheFilm #MajorGlimpse #AdiviSesh #MaheshBabu

Based on the life of real-life Hero Major Sandeep Unnikrishnan, Major, the film, aims to show how this valiant soldier saved the lives of numerous hostages before being martyred by the terrorists who wreaked havoc in the Taj Mahal Palace Mumbai, India on the 26th of November, 2008.

Major, a bilingual Hindi and Telugu film has been produced by Sony Pictures Films India in association with Mahesh Babu's GMB Entertainment Pvt. Ltd. and A+S Movies. It is directed by acclaimed Telugu director Sashi Kiran Tikka and features Adivi Sesh, Sobhita Dhulipala and Saiee Manjrekar. 


Starring Adivi Sesh, Saiee Manjrekar, Sobhita Dhulipala, Prakash Raj, Revathi, Murali Sharma 
Produced by: Sony Pictures, GMB Entertainment, and A+S Movies
Directed by: Sashi Kiran Tikka
Story and Screenplay: Adivi Sesh 
Script Guidance and Telugu Dialogue: Abburi Ravi 
Cinematography: Vamsi Patchipulusu
Music : Sri Charan Pakala
Lyrics: Ramajogayya Sastry (Telugu)
Production Designer: Avinash Kolla
Editor: Vinay Kumar Sirigineedi &  Kodati Pavan Kalyan
Action Choreography: Sunil Rodrigues 
Executive Producer: Rajiv Bharadwaj
Hindi Dialogues: Akshat Ajay Sharma
Costume Designer : Rekha Boggarapu
VFX Supervisor: CV Rao
Post Production: Annapurna Studios 
Publicity Designs : Anil-Bhanu

localized.title: Major Glimpse | Major Teaser on 28th March | Adivi Sesh | Sobhita | Saiee Manjrekar | Mahesh Babu
localized.description:
Major Glimpse: On Major Sandeep Unnikrishnan's Birth Anniversary, we remember.

‘The film speaks about the way he lived, not about the way he lost his life.’ Today, March 15th, Major Sandeep Unnikrishnan's birth anniversary, is not just a day to remember him but also a day to celebrate his glorious life.

#MajorTheFilm #MajorGlimpse #AdiviSesh #MaheshBabu

Based on the life of real-life Hero Major Sandeep Unnikrishnan, Major, the film, aims to show how this valiant soldier saved the lives of numerous hostages before being martyred by the terrorists who wreaked havoc in the Taj Mahal Palace Mumbai, India on the 26th of November, 2008.

Major, a bilingual Hindi and Telugu film has been produced by Sony Pictures Films India in association with Mahesh Babu's GMB Entertainment Pvt. Ltd. and A+S Movies. It is directed by acclaimed Telugu director Sashi Kiran Tikka and features Adivi Sesh, Sobhita Dhulipala and Saiee Manjrekar. 


Starring Adivi Sesh, Saiee Manjrekar, Sobhita Dhulipala, Prakash Raj, Revathi, Murali Sharma 
Produced by: Sony Pictures, GMB Entertainment, and A+S Movies
Directed by: Sashi Kiran Tikka
Story and Screenplay: Adivi Sesh 
Script Guidance and Telugu Dialogue: Abburi Ravi 
Cinematography: Vamsi Patchipulusu
Music : Sri Charan Pakala
Lyrics: Ramajogayya Sastry (Telugu)
Production Designer: Avinash Kolla
Editor: Vinay Kumar Sirigineedi &  Kodati Pavan Kalyan
Action Choreography: Sunil Rodrigues 
Executive Producer: Rajiv Bharadwaj
Hindi Dialogues: Akshat Ajay Sharma
Costume Designer : Rekha Boggarapu
VFX Supervisor: CV Rao
Post Production: Annapurna Studios 
Publicity Designs : Anil-Bhanu

snippet.title: Zack Snyder’s Justice League | Official Trailer #2 | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Superman’s (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube

Be the first to know more:
HBO Max: https://hbom.ax/YT
Like HBO Max on Facebook: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxFacebook
Follow HBO Max on Twitter: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxTwitter
Follow HBO Max on Instagram: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxInstagram

About HBO Max: 
HBO Max is WarnerMedia’s direct-to-consumer offering with 10,000 hours of curated premium content. HBO Max offers powerhouse programming for everyone in the home, bringing together HBO, a robust slate of new original series, key third-party licensed programs and movies, and fan favorites from WarnerMedia’s rich library including Warner Bros., New Line, DC, CNN, TNT, TBS, truTV, Turner Classic Movies, Cartoon Network, Adult Swim, Crunchyroll, Rooster Teeth, Looney Tunes and more. #HBOMax #WarnerMedia

snippet.title: इमली की ऐसी चटपटी चटनी एकबार बनाये और महीनों तक खायें | Imli Ki Chutney | Easy Tamarind Chutney 😋
snippet.description:
इमली की ऐसी चटपटी चटनी एकबार बनाये और महीनों तक खायें | Imli Ki Chutney | Easy Tamarind Chutney 😋

#ImliKiChutney#TamarindChutney#TataSampannMasale

Ingredients:-

Tamarind-300 gm
Jaggery-200 gm
Sugar-100 gm
Oil-1-2 tbsp
Asafoetida-2 pinch
Cumin Seeds-1 tsp
Black Pepper-1/2 tsp
Fennel Seeds-3/4 tsp
Dry Ginger Powder-1/2 tsp
Red Chilli Powder-1 tsp
Black Salt-1/2 tsp
Salt-3/4 tsp
Melon Seeds-2 tsp

Tata Sampann Masale - https://amzn.to/32DMys1

snippet.title: എമിലിനോടൊപ്പമുള്ള മണാലി യാത്രാ വിശേഷങ്ങൾ |Manali tour with Emil George and Family
snippet.description:
Thailand,Malaysia ,Singapore,Cambodia ,Maldives,Bali ,Sri Lanka,Dubai ,തുടങ്ങി ഏതു രാജ്യത്തേക്കുള്ള യാത്രകൾക്കും നിങ്ങള്ക്ക് എന്റെ ഓഫീസിസുമായി ബന്ധ പെടാവുന്നതു ആണ് .,വ്യത്യസ്തമായ യാത്ര അനുഭവങ്ങളും ,ഭക്ഷണരീതികളും നിങ്ങൾക്കു ഈ ചാനലിൽ കാണാം ,യാത്ര ചെയ്യാനാഗ്രഹിക്കുന്നവർ എന്റെ സ്ഥാപനമായ 
Royalsky Holidays സുമായി ബന്ധപെടുക :
+91 9846571800
കൂടുതൽ യാത്ര വിശേഷങ്ങൾക്കായി
എന്റെ യൂട്യൂബ് ചാനൽ ലിങ്ക് : https://goo.gl/PpGHR8 സബ്സ്ക്രൈബ് ചെയ്യൂ .
എന്റെ ഫേസ്ബുക് പേജ് ലിങ്ക് : https://goo.gl/yWTG96 ലൈക് ചെയ്യുകയും,കൂട്ടുകാർക്കു ഷെയർ ചെയ്യുകയും ചെയ്യുമല്ലോ ?

snippet.description:
Watch the Latest Promo of popular Tamil Serial #PooveUnakkaga that airs on Sun TV.

Watch your favorite serials Free on Sun NXT, immediately after TV. Offer Valid till 25th Mar 2021

Poove Unakkaga is a drama serial on Sun TV. Poovarasi and Keerthy share a heart-warming bond of friendship and hope to stay friends forever. Now Poovarasi makes a promise to her mother, that she won’t fall-in-love with anyone, but often dreams about a mysterious man. By a stroke of fate, he happens to be Kathir, a rich handsome young man who falls in love with Keerthy at first sight. Watch this refreshing tale of love and friendship to know more.

Watch your favorite serials Free on Sun NXT, immediately after TV. Offer Valid till 25th Mar 2021

Poove Unakkaga is a drama serial on Sun TV. Poovarasi and Keerthy share a heart-warming bond of friendship and hope to stay friends forever. Now Poovarasi makes a promise to her mother, that she won’t fall-in-love with anyone, but often dreams about a mysterious man. By a stroke of fate, he happens to be Kathir, a rich handsome young man who falls in love with Keerthy at first sight. Watch this refreshing tale of love and friendship to know more.

snippet.title: MUTTON BONE MARROW | Chettinad Mutton Bone Marrow Cooking and Eating in Village | Mutton Recipes
snippet.description:
Today in our village, we cook 100+ mutton bone marrow with the traditional Chettinad method. Mutton bone marrow is one of the tastiest piece in the mutton recipe. 

We collect a huge amount of bone marrow to make this mutton recipe.

We enjoy this traditionally cooked mutton bone recipe with our mutton gravy.

snippet.title: Explained | Why bomb was put outside Ambani house by Sachin Vaze, as per NIA
snippet.description:
Weeks after a bomb and a threat letter were found outside 'Antilia', the house of India's richest person Mukesh Ambani, the country's premier anti-terror agency, National Investigation Agency, claims to have cracked the case. NIA sources said that Mumbai cop Sachin Vaze, who has since been suspended, orchestrated the entire incident. So who is Vaze? Why did he allegedly choreograph the delivery of a chilling threat to the chief of Reliance Industries? And finally, what is the political fallout of this entire controversy? Watch the full video to find out.

00:00 - INTRODUCTION
1:00 - WHO IS VAZE?
1:58 - VAZE'S RETURN
2:32 - VAZE'S CURRENT STATUS
3:06 - THE AMBANI CASE
4:20 - THE TIHAR LINK
4:49 - NIA CLAIMS CASE SOLVED
5:15 - THE POLITICAL STORM

snippet.title: Chhote Pack Mein Bada Dil - Doublemint Freshtake S1 | Shaan | Gaurav D | Vishal Pandey | Sonarika B
snippet.description:
Sung by one of the most loved voices of India, #Shaan alongside the sensational singer and composer, Gaurav Dagaonkar, "Chhote Pack Mein Bada Dil" is an endearing story of a first crush, featuring #VishalPandey, #SonarikaBhadoria and Aliya Hamidi.

After the success of - "Aadatein", featuring #ShivangiJoshi​ and Suraj Roy, the double-dhamaka of #AwezDarbar​ and #ZaidDarbar​'s "Tera Kya Hota", followed by "Aaina" featuring #AnushkaSen & #HarshRajput, DOUBLEMINT FRESHTAKE is set to end season 1 on a high note with Chhote Pack Mein Bada Dil. This upbeat and groovy melody composed by Gaurav Dagaonkar, written by Geet Sagar and weaved into a gripping direction by Joydeep Banerjee is bound to make you remember your first crush too! :)
#CPMBD​ #Crush​ #Musicvideo​ #Doublemintfreshtake​ 

Tell us the story of your first crush in the comments section!
Like || Share || Comment

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

snippet.title: Bhogilal Pakda Gaya! | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा - Ep 3123
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku 

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi 
Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak Mehta
Set Design: Jayant Deshmukh
On-Air Promotion  ( SAB): SAB OAP
Costume Designer: Alka Mehta
Costume Stylist: Ekta Brahmbhatt
Sound Recordist: Shakeel Mansuri 
Cameraman: Aamir Virani
Production Head: Arvind Marchande
Production Controler: Vinod Shishupal
Background Music: Sunil Patni
Online Editors: Vishal Tambe, Sandeep Singh 
Executive Producer: Jatin Yogesh Bajaj
Editor: Dinesh Gosavi, Kaushal Mistry, Devang Modi, Vinod Maurya
Creative Supervision: Krunal Khakhkhar
Operation Head: Sohil Ramani
Written By: Raju Odedra & Rajen Upadhyay
Directors: Harshad Joshi, Malav Suresh Rajda

Television Adaptation and Designed By: Asit Kumarr Modi

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 1196 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
An unsuspecting Heer is left shocked when she is ambushed by Angel and her henchmen! Watch the sneak peek of the upcoming episode.
#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: Popatlal हुआ Jetha से नाराज़ -Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah- तारक मेहता -Ep 3124 - 17th March, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/happy-days-are-back-again-1000111515?watch=true#utm_source=YOUTUBE&utm_medium=slate&utm_campaign=YT_traffic

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3124: Popatlal Gets Upset With Jethalal
---------------------------------------------------------
Iyer is extremely happy with Jethalal and states that it is because of him that his boss praised him in front of the employees. Jetha and Taarak then decide to play a prank on everyone. After their prank, Sodhi plays another prank on the pair. After their shenanigans, Jethalal asks Popatlal to pay their soda bill. Popatlal takes offence to this and says that despite Jethalal, Iyer and Bhide getting their money, it is unfair that it is him who has to pay for their soda bill.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3124: Popatlal Gets Upset With Jethalal
---------------------------------------------------------
Iyer is extremely happy with Jethalal and states that it is because of him that his boss praised him in front of the employees. Jetha and Taarak then decide to play a prank on everyone. After their prank, Sodhi plays another prank on the pair. After their shenanigans, Jethalal asks Popatlal to pay their soda bill. Popatlal takes offence to this and says that despite Jethalal, Iyer and Bhide getting their money, it is unfair that it is him who has to pay for their soda bill.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Pinjara Khubsurti Ka | पिंजरा खुबसूरती का | Episode 148 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
Mayura finally learns that Tara is none other than her daughter! Watch the sneak peek of the upcoming episode.
#ColorsTV #PinjaraKhubsurtiKa

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Mayura is the epitome of beauty, grace and intelligence, but the world only sees her beauty. Trapped in a cage by a society that judges by looks, Mayura yearns for her freedom to fly free. What happens to her fight for individuality when she ends up in a marriage with Omkar, a control freak obsessed with her beauty? Will he ever see his wife beyond her physical form? Will Mayura ever fulfil her own dreams? Or will she remain trapped in her beautiful pinjaraa for life?

snippet.title: सर्वांत जास्त आग्रह केलेली स्ट्रीट स्टाईल व्हेज मोमोज | Street Style Veg Momos Recipe| MadhuraRecipe
snippet.description:
व्हेज मोमोज बनवण्यासाठी लागणारे साहित्य 
• १ कप बारीक चिरलेला किंवा किसलेला कोबी 
• १/२ कप बारीक किसलेलं गाजर 
• बारीक चिरलेला कांदा
• चवीनुसार मीठ 
• १ कप मैदा 
• चवीनुसार मीठ 
• १ चमचा तेल 
• पाणी 
• बारीक चिरलेला लसूण 
• १/२ चमचा किसलेलं आलं 
• बारीक चिरलेली हिरवी मिरची 
• मिरपूड 
• बारीक चिरलेली कोथिंबीर (ऐच्छिक)

#VegMomosRecipe #Momos #MadhurasRecipe

Madhura's recipe Masala (Pack of 3)  - https://amzn.to/2L6y13i
Madhurasrecipe Kanda Lasoon Masala - https://amzn.to/3okkjrP
Madhurasrecipe Byadgi Mirchi Masala - https://amzn.to/3hKvRSU
Madhurasrecipe Goda Masala - https://amzn.to/3hRjsg6
Flipkart - https://bityl.co/4Ip9
किंवा ९१३६८२२२२४ या नंबर वर व्हॉटसऍप मेसेज करा  

मधुराज रेसिपी मसाले ऑर्डर कसे करायचे यासाठी हा विडिओ पहा
https://youtu.be/9Db_owqWJe4

Momos is a popular street food. It is steamed dumpling with different stuffing. Today we are making veg momos on your huge demand. These turn out really yummy. This is authentic north Indian style recipe. This can be a good variation for your evening snack or even breakfast. It is very easy and simple recipe. You can try this recipe at home and drop a comment for me. Do not forget to like, share and subscribe.

Ingredients:
• 1 cup finely grated Cabbage
• 1/2 cup finely grated Carrot
• Finely chopped Onion
• Salt to taste
• 1 cup Maida
• Salt to taste
• 1 tsp Oil
• Water
• Finely chopped Garlic
• 1/2 tsp grated Ginger
• Finely chopped Green chili
• Black pepper powder
• Finely chopped Coriander leaves (Optional)

Method:
• Take cabbage, carrot, onion, salt in a strainer and mix well. 
• Rest the veggies mixture aside for about 30 minutes. 
• Take maida in a dish and add salt, oil. 
• You can use wheat flour in place of maida. 
• Mix well and add a little water at a time to knead a little stiff dough. 
• Cover and rest the dough for about 30 minutes. 
• Squeeze out as much water as possible from the veggies and transfer into a bowl. 
• You can use the squeezed water for making dal or for making vegetable soup. 
• Add garlic, ginger, green chili, black pepper powder, coriander leaves to the veggies and mix 
  well. 
•  Adding coriander leaves is optional. You can skip it if you don’t want. 
• Stuffing is ready. 
• Take the dough and knead it once to make smooth and even. 
• Make small balls form the dough and make them smooth and even. 
• Take one dough ball and roll it into as thin disc as possible. 
• Fill the stuffing and begin to fold from the center of the disc to make plates. 
• Lift the other half edge and close it up with the plates. Seal it well. 
• Grease the steamer dish well with oil and transfer the momos into it. 
• You can steam the momos in idly plates or even in a dish.
• Steam momos on medium heat for just 10 minutes. 
• Remove the lid and take the momos out. 
• Momos are all ready. 
• You can make around 17-18 momos from 1 cup maida.

snippet.title: King - Saloot | The Gorilla Bounce | Prod. by Section 8 | Latest Hit Songs 2021
snippet.description:
🔥♥️Follow🤴🏾On Instagram♥️🔥
https://www.instagram.com/ifeelking

LYRICS:
Hook

Jithhe khada yaar tera ohthe vajde saloot
Main chak ke qalam saare beri karaan shoot
Shareef hunda si jamana karda si use
Hun beriyaan di jaan sukhaade Raja!

Verse 1


Main karna rap,
Beriyaan nu mere aana aj hosh kive?
Main bharda bag,
Nottan to vadd hona dasso josh kive?
They callin’ me GOAT,
Har baar maru naya sa flow.
Har baar maru naya main hit.
Enhadi Industry dena main kho.
kho hoe!
1 saal vich mene agg layi baby,
1 saal vich tripple price baby,
'21 - New Life - Eyes On Prize
Poori Hype - Poori Hype - Poori
Woah - Woah - Woooo/Pphirraahh
Jo hona bhund mein dum ni
Kala mein rang ni beta muh band hi rakho!
Jo mujhe rokna chaho rok na pao
to beta muh band hi rakho!
Main bana dekhte dekhte kal ki awaaz
tum beta muh band hi rakho!
Mujhe kala pe hai maan , main leta inaam
tum beta bas duro takhhon!
Mujhe aane wala kal dikhta hai,
Duniya kehti ye alag likta hai,
Mujhse bada karobaari koi banda nai,
Main dard bhi likhun to bikta hai.
Jaddo mildayan dokhha ta tadapdi eh rooh,
Jadd bannde star ta pher change honde view,
Hun kari billo call mere manager nu.
Bitch get out my fuckn way cz Raja coming through!


Hook

Jithhe khada yaar tera ohthe vajde saloot
Main chak ke qalam saare beri karaan shoot
Shareef hunda si jamana karda si use
Hun beriyaan di jaan sukhaade Raja!

Verse 2


Baby Baby Baby
Mere jaisa hoga duja na koi,
Baby Baby Baby
Yaad mein meri tu raat na soyi,
Aankhe kholun mujhe lage ke jaise main tere hi saath khada...par baat ye itti purani ho gayi ke dil bhi kehta na baat bada.
Ab jana darr nahi lagta mujhe,
Ke main duniya mein chupp jaunga,
Ab jo bhi cheez aa gayi pasand mujhe,
Ya to jeetunga ya mit jaunga.
Main jithhe rakhhan pair uthhe kardaahan rule,
Life jeeni king size bas ehiaanh usool,
Main jadd phada mic baby taan uthi aan dhool.
Oh Pichhe hatt da na...

Hook

Jithhe khada yaar tera ohthe vajde saloot
Main chak ke qalam saare beri karaan shoot
Shareef hunda si jamana karda si use
Hun beriyaan di jaan sukhaade Raja!

snippet.title: Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)
snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgia​​

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances. 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-J-​​...

See more official videos from Dua Lipa here:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list​​...

Listen to more from the album 'Future Nostalgia' :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list​​...

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagram​​
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebook​​
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficial​​
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitter​​
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtube​​

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipa​ #FutureNostalgia​ #Grammys

Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipa​ #FutureNostalgia​ #Grammys

snippet.title: Choti Sarrdaarni | छोटी सरदारनी | Episode 429 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
Sarabjeet fails to contain his worry and asks Sandhya about Meher. What does Sandhya have to say? Watch the sneak peek of the upcoming episode to know.
#ColorsTV #ChotiSarrdaarni

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Meher is coerced by her mother into marrying Sarabjeet, a widower with a 5 year-old child. But, much to her mother’s dislike, Meher is pregnant with her lover, Manav’s child. Can she stand up for her love and fight her own? This is the journey of a strong-willed woman who makes her own rules and stands by them, come what may. Naag se badh kar Naagin, Sher se badh kar Sherni aur Sardar se badh kar Choti Sarrdaarni! Watch the fiercely independent sardani take on the world and protect her family in Choti Sarrdaarni.

snippet.title: ആരും കണ്ട് മയങ്ങണ് Classmates | Thanseer koothuparamba Azi mol ansar ansu Munaz Haneefa nizar shriya
snippet.description:
➤ Album : Classmates 
➤ Song Name: Azhakilai 
➤ Singer : Thanseer koothuparamba
➤ Music  : Haneefa Ksd
➤ Lyrics : Haneefa Ksd
➤ Orchestraion : Sai Balan
➤ Camera :  Nizar shriya
➤ Editting : Nizar shriya
➤ Marketting : Taalboys vision
➤ Cast : Thanseer koothuparamba Azi mol
➤ cast : Mehnaz mehnu & Crew
➤ Story : Ansar Ansu & Munaz Munnu
➤ Feedback : 9745268950 [ Whatsapp ]
➤ Diriction  : Ansar Ansu & Munaz Munnu
➤ Produced : Rinjas Rinju & Yasar Kallai
...................................................................................................
Classmates | Azhakilai | Thanseer koothuparamba | Azi mol ansar ansu Munaz Haneefa Ksd nizar shriya

...................................................................................................

➤ Lyrics 
Azhakilaay viriyumaa niranilavin punjiri
Surumayaal varanoraa mizhikalil minnum muhabath.. 
Aarum kand mayangan.. 
Oolen qalb kavaranu.. 
Enthoo ullam pidayan.. 
Ishkaal enne nokan.. 
Manamil nirayum manas thirayum madhuramam chiri vidharumivalinn (2)

     ( Azhakilay viruyuma..)

Ishal vaniyilu.. 
ithal viriyan.. 
Ival chelotha kaarmugiloo... 
Vaathilkarikilu.. 
nine thedi varunu.. njanum ee vazhiyeee ..
Aaro malarmani aaro.. 
Ival ente kanavile penno.. 
Aarum kanathe ni enne
Vennilavee.. En arikee.. 
Penne penne niyen muhabathaay ishalumaay thazhuki nee.. Chernilleee.. Ooo

      (Azhakilay viriyuma..) 

Nilavaniyival.. 
Kinaavarayile lenkum kasavin chelumaaayy.. 
Monjaal vidarum.. Ninte poomugam kanan ezham baharupol.. 
Penne cheruchiri vidarumoo.. 
Ente karalil cherniduu.. 
Ennil pirishavumekumoo.. 
Arikilaay.. Thennalaay.. 
Penne penne mahar ekidam ennumen nenjilay neeyallayoo.. Ooo

Azhakilaay viriyumaa niranilavin punjiri
Surumayaal varanora mizhikalil minnum muhabath.. 
Aarum kand mayangan.. 
Oolen qalb kavaranu.. 
Enthoo ullam pidayan.. 
Ishkaal enje nokan..   
Manamil nirayum manas thirayum madhuramam chiri vidharumivalinn (2)
      (Azhakilaay viriyuma..)

...................................................................................................
അഴകിലായ് വിരിയുമാ നിറനിലാവിൻ പുഞ്ചിരി..
സുറുമായാൽ വരനൊരാ മിഴികളിൽ മിന്നും മുഹബത്..
ആരും കണ്ട് മയങ്ങണ്..
ഓളെൻ ഖൽബ് കവരണ്..
എന്തോ ഉള്ളം പിടയണ്..
ഇഷ്കാൽ എന്നെ നോക്കണ്..
മനമിൽ നിറയും മനസ് തിരയും മധുരമാം ചിരി വിധറുമിവളിന്ന്... [2]
        (അഴകിലായ് വിരിയുമാ..)

ഇശൽ വനിയില് ..
ഇതൾ വിരിയണു..
ഇവൾ ചേലോത്ത കാര്മുഗിലോ..
വാതിൽക്കരികിലു നിന്നെ തേടി വരുന്നു.. ഞാനും ഈ വഴിയേ.. ആരോ മലർമണി ആരോ..
ഇവൾ എന്റെ കനവിലെ പെണ്ണോ..
ആരും കാണാതെ നീ എന്നെ..
വെണ്ണിലവേ.. എൻ അരികേ..
പെണ്ണെ പെണ്ണെ നീ എൻ മുഹബതായി ഇശലുമായി തഴുകി നീ.. ചേർന്നില്ലേ.. ഓ ഓ
     (അഴകിലായ് വിരിയുമാ..)

നിലാവനിയിവൾ..
കിനാവറയിലെ ലെങ്കും കസവിൻ ചേലുമായ്..
മൊഞ്ജാൽ വിടരും.. നിന്റെ പൂമുഖം കാണാൻ ഏഴാം ബഹറ് പോൽ..
പെണ്ണെ ചെറുച്ചിരി വിടരുമോ..
എന്റെ കരളിൽ ചേർന്നിടു..
എന്നിൽ പിരിശവുമെക്കുമോ..
അരികിലായ്.. തെന്നലായ്..
പെണ്ണെ പെണ്ണെ മഹർ ഏകിടാം.. എന്നുമെൻ നെഞ്ചിലായ് നീയല്ലയോ.. ഓ ഓ

അഴകിലായ് വിരിയുമാ നിറനിലാവിൻ പുഞ്ചിരി..
സുറുമായാൽ വരാനൊരാ മിഴികളിൽ മിന്നും മുഹബത്..
ആരും കണ്ട് മയങ്ങണ്..
ഓളെൻ ഖൽബ് കവരണ്..
എന്തോ ഉള്ളം പിടയണ്..
ഇഷ്കാൽ എന്നെ നോക്കണ്..
മനമിൽ നിറയും മനസ് തിരയും മധുരമാം ചിരി വിധറുമിവളിന്ന്... [2]
        (അഴകിലായ് വിരിയുമാ..)

...................................................................................................

➤ Lyrics 
Azhakilaay viriyumaa niranilavin punjiri
Surumayaal varanoraa mizhikalil minnum muhabath.. 
Aarum kand mayangan.. 
Oolen qalb kavaranu.. 
Enthoo ullam pidayan.. 
Ishkaal enne nokan.. 
Manamil nirayum manas thirayum madhuramam chiri vidharumivalinn (2)

     ( Azhakilay viruyuma..)

Ishal vaniyilu.. 
ithal viriyan.. 
Ival chelotha kaarmugiloo... 
Vaathilkarikilu.. 
nine thedi varunu.. njanum ee vazhiyeee ..
Aaro malarmani aaro.. 
Ival ente kanavile penno.. 
Aarum kanathe ni enne
Vennilavee.. En arikee.. 
Penne penne niyen muhabathaay ishalumaay thazhuki nee.. Chernilleee.. Ooo

      (Azhakilay viriyuma..) 

Nilavaniyival.. 
Kinaavarayile lenkum kasavin chelumaaayy.. 
Monjaal vidarum.. Ninte poomugam kanan ezham baharupol.. 
Penne cheruchiri vidarumoo.. 
Ente karalil cherniduu.. 
Ennil pirishavumekumoo.. 
Arikilaay.. Thennalaay.. 
Penne penne mahar ekidam ennumen nenjilay neeyallayoo.. Ooo

Azhakilaay viriyumaa niranilavin punjiri
Surumayaal varanora mizhikalil minnum muhabath.. 
Aarum kand mayangan.. 
Oolen qalb kavaranu.. 
Enthoo ullam pidayan.. 
Ishkaal enje nokan..   
Manamil nirayum manas thirayum madhuramam chiri vidharumivalinn (2)
      (Azhakilaay viriyuma..)

...................................................................................................
അഴകിലായ് വിരിയുമാ നിറനിലാവിൻ പുഞ്ചിരി..
സുറുമായാൽ വരനൊരാ മിഴികളിൽ മിന്നും മുഹബത്..
ആരും കണ്ട് മയങ്ങണ്..
ഓളെൻ ഖൽബ് കവരണ്..
എന്തോ ഉള്ളം പിടയണ്..
ഇഷ്കാൽ എന്നെ നോക്കണ്..
മനമിൽ നിറയും മനസ് തിരയും മധുരമാം ചിരി വിധറുമിവളിന്ന്... [2]
        (അഴകിലായ് വിരിയുമാ..)

ഇശൽ വനിയില് ..
ഇതൾ വിരിയണു..
ഇവൾ ചേലോത്ത കാര്മുഗിലോ..
വാതിൽക്കരികിലു നിന്നെ തേടി വരുന്നു.. ഞാനും ഈ വഴിയേ.. ആരോ മലർമണി ആരോ..
ഇവൾ എന്റെ കനവിലെ പെണ്ണോ..
ആരും കാണാതെ നീ എന്നെ..
വെണ്ണിലവേ.. എൻ അരികേ..
പെണ്ണെ പെണ്ണെ നീ എൻ മുഹബതായി ഇശലുമായി തഴുകി നീ.. ചേർന്നില്ലേ.. ഓ ഓ
     (അഴകിലായ് വിരിയുമാ..)

നിലാവനിയിവൾ..
കിനാവറയിലെ ലെങ്കും കസവിൻ ചേലുമായ്..
മൊഞ്ജാൽ വിടരും.. നിന്റെ പൂമുഖം കാണാൻ ഏഴാം ബഹറ് പോൽ..
പെണ്ണെ ചെറുച്ചിരി വിടരുമോ..
എന്റെ കരളിൽ ചേർന്നിടു..
എന്നിൽ പിരിശവുമെക്കുമോ..
അരികിലായ്.. തെന്നലായ്..
പെണ്ണെ പെണ്ണെ മഹർ ഏകിടാം.. എന്നുമെൻ നെഞ്ചിലായ് നീയല്ലയോ.. ഓ ഓ

അഴകിലായ് വിരിയുമാ നിറനിലാവിൻ പുഞ്ചിരി..

snippet.title: PM Modi's remarks at meeting with Chief Ministers on Covid-19 situation
snippet.description:
Prime Minister Shri Narendra Modi interacted with the Chief Ministers of various states today regarding the COVID-19 situation via video conference.

The Chief Ministers praised the leadership of the Prime Minister in the fight against Covid. They thanked the Prime Minister for the smooth implementation of the vaccination drive all across the country, while also giving their inputs and suggestions to further expand the vaccination coverage.

The challenge of maintaining Covid appropriate behaviour in the general public was also discussed, in light of the recent rise in the number of cases in some states. The Chief Ministers agreed on the requirement of greater vigilance and monitoring of the situation.

The Home Minister listed out the districts on which the Chief Ministers need to put special focus, in order to contain the spread of the virus. The Union Health Secretary gave a presentation on the current Covid situation in the country and the vaccination strategy.

Addressing the Chief Ministers, the Prime Minister said that more than 96% of the cases in India have recovered and India is having one of the lowest fatality rates in the world. He expressed concern about the high test positivity rate in Maharashtra and MP. and rising cases in Punjab and Maharashtra. 70 districts of the country witnessed 150 percent rise in the last few weeks. He urged to stop this emerging "second peak" of Corona immediately and warned that if we do not stop this growing pandemic now, then a country-wide outbreak can occur.

For stopping this emerging "second peak" of Corona, the Prime Minister stressed the need to take quick and decisive steps. He stressed the importance of solving the problems of local governance. He warned that the confidence which came from our achievements in the battle against Corona should not turn into negligence. He further stressed that the public should not be brought to panic mode and at the same time also get rid of trouble. He stressed the need to strategize by incorporating our past experiences, in our efforts.

The Prime Minister noted the need for provision of micro containment zones. He stressed the need to be serious about 'Test, Track and Treat' as we have been doing for the last one year. He said it is very important to track every infected person's contacts in the shortest time and keep the RT-PCR test rate above 70 percent. He insisted on more RT-PCR tests in states which give more emphasis to Rapid antigen tests like Kerala, Odisha, Chhattisgarh and U.P.

The Prime Minister urged to increase testing and to pay special attention to the "referral system" and "ambulance network" in small cities. He said this is because now the whole country has opened up for travel and the number of people travelling has also increased. He stressed on the need for a new mechanism for sharing information among themselves. Similarly, responsibility of following the SOP for surveillance of the contacts of the travelers coming from abroad have also increased.

The Prime Minister remarked that we need to identify mutants of coronavirus and assess their effects. He lauded the continually increased pace of vaccination in the country and the vaccination rates crossing more than 3 million vaccinations in a single day. But at the same time he warned to take the problem of vaccine doses wastage very seriously. He noted that the vaccine waste in Telangana, Andhra Pradesh and Uttar Pradesh to the tune of  10 percent. He urged to immediately correct the drawbacks of planning and governance at the local level to reduce vaccine waste.

The Prime Minister summed up that along with the above steps the basic steps to prevent the spread of this infection are wearing masks, maintaining physical distance, taking care of cleanliness etc. He urged that there should be no laxity in such steps and people's awareness will have to be raised on these subjects. He called for increasing the number of vaccination centres and asked to stay vigilant about the vaccine expiry date.  ‘Dawai bhi aur kadai bhi’ insisted the Prime Minister.

Episode 3122: Jethala Shows The Proof
---------------------------------------------------------
While Gokuldham members enter the society gate dancing, Chalu Pandey sees them and makes them stop because Bhogilal had called him and filed a false complaint against Jethalal. Chalu Pandey questions Jethalal and others and takes Bhogilal's side. Jetha explains to him the entire scenario and shows the proven video to Pandey Ji. what will happen next? watch the full episode now.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

snippet.title: Agnishikha - Full Episode | 15 March 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Agnishikha" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Agnishika: Sikha is an innocent naïve tribal girl, who is the Star of her village Baghshundi. Sikha has respect for her traditions. Vikram visits Shikha’s village and unknowingly participates in some rituals with her, which according to her tribe is a marriage ceremony. So when Shikha’s community goes back to Bikram to ask him to accept her as his wife, Bikram denies the same because he was totally unaware of the whole scenario

snippet.title: BREAKING : கொரோனா 2வது அலை - பிரதமரின் அதிரடி முடிவு | Coronavirus | Lockdown | PM Modi
snippet.description:
"கொரோனா தொற்றின் 2வது அலையை உடனடியாக தடுத்து நிறுத்த வேண்டும்"

முதல்வர்களுடனான ஆலோசனை கூட்டத்தில் பிரதமர் மோடி வலியுறுத்தல்

உறுதியான நடவடிக்கைகளை எடுக்குமாறு மாநிலங்களுக்கு பிரதமர் அறிவுறுத்தல்

"பெருந்தொற்றை தடுத்து நிறுத்தாவிட்டால், நாடு தழுவிய நோய் பரவலுக்கு வழிவகுக்கும்"

"சிறு நகரங்களிலும் கொரோனா பரிசோதனையை தீவிரப்படுத்த வேண்டும்"

"கொரோனா 2வது அலை - தடுக்க அறிவுறுத்தல்"

#Coronavirus #Lockdown #PMModi

localized.title: BREAKING : கொரோனா 2வது அலை - பிரதமரின் அதிரடி முடிவு | Coronavirus | Lockdown | PM Modi
localized.description:
"கொரோனா தொற்றின் 2வது அலையை உடனடியாக தடுத்து நிறுத்த வேண்டும்"

முதல்வர்களுடனான ஆலோசனை கூட்டத்தில் பிரதமர் மோடி வலியுறுத்தல்

உறுதியான நடவடிக்கைகளை எடுக்குமாறு மாநிலங்களுக்கு பிரதமர் அறிவுறுத்தல்

"பெருந்தொற்றை தடுத்து நிறுத்தாவிட்டால், நாடு தழுவிய நோய் பரவலுக்கு வழிவகுக்கும்"

"சிறு நகரங்களிலும் கொரோனா பரிசோதனையை தீவிரப்படுத்த வேண்டும்"

"கொரோனா 2வது அலை - தடுக்க அறிவுறுத்தல்"

snippet.title: Feel the Power Promo (Kannada) -Yuvarathnaa | Puneeth Rajkumar | Santhosh Ananddram | Hombale Films
snippet.description:
Presenting 'Feel the Power', video song promo, from Puneeth Rajkumar's upcoming Kannada film 'Yuvarathnaa', Directed by Santhosh Ananddram, Music by Thaman S, Produced by Vijay Kiragandur under Hombale Films. 

Watch and listen to this energetic and unforgettable track composed by Thaman S that'll make you 'Feel The Power.'

Putting up a show of Powerful moves led by Puneeth Rajkumar, Jaani Master's style will keep you hooked to the screen. With a perky musical score, Feel The Power shall mark a new era.  
Shashank Sheshagiri's voice, Santhosh Anandram's lyrics will leave you with a fantastic experience. 

See, Share, and make it a part of your music playlists! Get a load of more such Kannada videos, Kannada songs, and Kannada cinema updates by subscribing to Hombale Films YouTube Channel.
http://bit.ly/SubscribetoHombaleFilms​

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

snippet.title: What Bengaluru Woman, Zomato Agent Told NDTV: "He Pushed The Door" vs "She Threw Shoes"
snippet.description:
Two days after a Bengaluru woman alleged she was attacked by a Zomato delivery agent and shared videos showing her bleeding nose, there are two versions of a story that now involves an investigation and that has divided social media. The accused man, Kamaraj, says he was beaten with shoes and abuses were hurled at him, which the customer, Hitesha Chandranee, has emphatically denied. Zomato says it is supporting both, pending investigations, and wants "both sides of the story to come to light".

NDTV is one of the leaders in the production and broadcasting of un-biased and comprehensive news and entertainment programmes in India and abroad. NDTV delivers reliable information across all platforms: TV, Internet and Mobile.

snippet.title: ROSÉ - 'On The Ground' M/V
snippet.description:
On The Ground

My life's been magic seems fantastic
I used to have a hole in the wall with a mattress
It’s funny when you want it
Suddenly you have it
You find out that your gold’s just plastic

Every day every night
I’ve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me I’m never coming down

I worked my whole life
Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground

Nah but they don’t hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
Nah but they don’t hear me though (You’re running out of time)

My world’s been hectic seems electric
But I’ve been waking up with your voice in my head
And I’m trying to send a message
And let you know that every single minute I’m without you I regret it

Every day every night
I’ve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me I’m never coming down
I worked my whole life
Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground

Nah but they don’t hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
Nah but they don’t hear me though (You’re running out of time)

I’m way up in the clouds
And they say I’ve made it now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the ground

Just drove by your house
So far from you now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground
Nah but they don’t hear me though

On the ground
Nah but they don’t hear me though
Everything I need is on the ground

snippet.title: Kanyadaan - Full Episode | 15 March 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Kanyadaan" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Kanyadaan: Synopsis : Kanyadan is a story of a father Anjan Basu - a History teacher and his five daughters. After his wife’s demise, Anjan Basu had always been the guiding light & the support system to his daughters’ life, which paved its way even after they got married. He has always guarded his daughters with all his principles & ideals, through all the complexities of life and lead them with love to get them through and survive. The story revolves around the lives of these characters and their journey.

snippet.title: बस 1 लाख की कार, क्यों हुई बंद - Small Business Lesson - Story Of An Automobile Product - AMF Ep 23
snippet.description:
In automobile industry, we always see many innovations. But why and how did a wondeful automobile innovation like Tata Nano, which was the most affordable car failed in the business competition?

Know more about this in this episode of (Amazing Micro Facts) series.

AMF (Amazing Micro Facts) is a mini knowledge series by Rajesh Kumar AKA FactTechz where we explore different amazing facts related to science, astronomy, finance, technology and various general facts. This is the episode 23 of AMF.

Enjoy the show!

localized.description:
In automobile industry, we always see many innovations. But why and how did a wondeful automobile innovation like Tata Nano, which was the most affordable car failed in the business competition?

Know more about this in this episode of (Amazing Micro Facts) series.

AMF (Amazing Micro Facts) is a mini knowledge series by Rajesh Kumar AKA FactTechz where we explore different amazing facts related to science, astronomy, finance, technology and various general facts. This is the episode 23 of AMF.

Enjoy the show!

snippet.title: Swaragini | स्वरागिनी | Episode 170 | Lakshya Abducts Swara | Colors Rishtey
snippet.description:
Swara's grandmother wants her to stick with Sanskaar. Lakshya reveals his love for Swara and wants to marry her after she divorces Sanskaar.


'Swaragini' is a story about Swara and Ragini, who belong to warring families, but later realise that they are in fact half-sisters. Out of sheer hatred, Ragini manipulates Swara's love interest, Lakshaya into marriage, while Swara ends up getting married to Lakshya's brother, Sanskar. Once he learns the truth, Sanskar swears to reunite Swara with Lakshya, but in turn falls in love with her. Will Swara choose her lover over her husband, or will the sanctity of holy matrimony triumph?


#Swaragini #ColorsRishtey #Voot
